title: Aurora Commands
description: 4 simple & easy-to-use commands for any / all players!
body:
## Aurora Commands
A set of 4 simple commands meant for server owners & players intended to expand on the vanilla server experience.

### Commands
**/invulnerability** Makes the sender invulnerable to all damage, and invisible to hostile mob AI. Can also be toggle by typing /nodamage or /god.

**/optest** Reports to the sender whether or not they have operator permissions. Can also be used by typing /swag or /whatsmyswag

**/saturate & /desaturate** Either sets your hunger bar fo maximum or minimum. Can also be used by typing /feed or /unfeed.
